title: selaginella aenea
intro: Selaginella aenea is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as a type of resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after periods of drought. The plant is traditionally used in medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Selaginella aenea is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
